measurement_process_features.is_missing: 1 when no raw measurement exists at the current ICU hour; computed before LOCF
measurement_process_features.time_since_last_measurement_h: hours since the most recent raw measurement; no future backfill

rolling_features.std: rolling sample standard deviation; one observation is set to zero
rolling_features.change: current LOCF value minus the value at the beginning of the window
rolling_features.abnormal_duration: number of hourly LOCF states outside the predefined clinical range
rolling_features.abnormal_frequency: fraction of actual measurements outside the predefined clinical range

leakage_control: all features use current/past hours within stay_id only
